name: My employer didn't give me a respirator for paint fumes, can they be sued?

mainEntity.name: My employer didn't give me a respirator for paint fumes, can they be sued?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp claim + OSHA report; suit rare.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp claim primary; OSHA violation supports it, rare suit unless intentional.**

OSHA mandates respirators when needed; non-compliance liable for penalties, aids comp[1][4]. Idaho/Utah comp exclusive[10].

- Document lack of PPE.
- File OSHA complaint.
- Comp covers injuries.

Report hazard, file comp; lawyer pursues max benefits. OSHA fines employer[4].

description: Comp claim + OSHA report; suit rare.
